allow: Bash(node -e "const en = require\('./src/messages/en.json'\); const ar = require\('./src/messages/ar.json'\); console.log\('EN formAnalysis:', JSON.stringify\(en.formAnalysis, null, 2\)\); console.log\('AR formAnalysis:', JSON.stringify\(ar.formAnalysis, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const en = require\('./src/messages/en.json'\); console.log\('statsTopAnswersTimes:', en.formAnalysis.statsTopAnswersTimes\); console.log\('statsNoData:', en.formAnalysis.statsNoData\);")
Bash(node -e "const en = require\('./src/messages/en.json'\); const keys = Object.keys\(en.formAnalysis\); console.log\(keys.join\('\\n'\)\);")
